title: klickd Envelope v3.0
description: Normative schema for the .klickd envelope (outer JSON structure, encrypted mode). See SPEC.md v3.0 §20.1.

klickd_version.description: Format version. MUST be '3.x' for v3.0 files. Decoders MUST reject unknown major versions with KLICKD_E_VERSION.

encrypted.description: Indicates encrypted mode. MUST be true in encrypted mode.

domain.description: Semantic domain category. Registered values: education, work, finance, legal, creative, health, research, robotics. Custom non-empty strings are permitted.

created_at.description: RFC 3339 UTC timestamp, Z-suffix only. Fractional seconds are NOT permitted.

kdf.description: Key derivation function descriptor. See SPEC.md §14 and §15.

name.description: KDF algorithm identifier. Unknown values MUST trigger KLICKD_E_KDF.

m.description: Memory cost in kibibytes. Minimum 65536 (64 MiB). Default: 65536.

t.description: Time cost (number of passes). Minimum 1. Default: 3.

oneOf.title: PBKDF2-SHA256 parameters
oneOf.description: Parameters for PBKDF2-HMAC-SHA256 KDF (RFC 8018). Legacy; use only when Argon2id is unavailable.

iterations.description: PBKDF2 iteration count. Minimum 600000. Values below minimum MUST trigger KLICKD_E_KDF.

salt.description: RFC 4648 §4 standard base64 (padded). MUST decode to at least 16 bytes. Encoders MUST generate 16 bytes from a CSPRNG.

name.description: Cipher algorithm. MUST be 'AES-256-GCM' in v3.0.

iv.description: RFC 4648 §4 standard base64 (padded). MUST decode to exactly 12 bytes. Encoders MUST generate 12 bytes from a CSPRNG. MUST NOT reuse (key, IV) pair.

ciphertext.description: RFC 4648 §4 standard base64 (padded). Encodes ciphertext_bytes || 16-byte GCM tag. Minimum decoded length: 16 bytes. Values below minimum MUST trigger KLICKD_E_FORMAT.
